Block.Para: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (transportation benefits)

Also available on the Parliament of Canada Web Site at the following address:
http://www.parl.gc.ca
This enactment amends the Income Tax Act to provide for a tax exemption for employee transportation benefits.
An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (transportation benefits)
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:
1. The Income Tax Act is amended by adding the following after subsection 81(3.1):

Para.change: (3.2) There shall not be included in computing an individualâs income for a taxation year an amount received by the individual from an employer with whom the individual was dealing at armâs length for, or reimbursement of, eligible transportation benefits.
(3.3) The following definitions apply in this section.

Block.MarginalNote:
âeligible transportation benefitsâ
Â« avantage admissible relatif au transport Â»

Para.change: (a) a monthly amount that does not exceed $150 received or paid by the individual to commute from the individualâs place of residence to his or her place of employment on public commuter transit services,
(b) a monthly amount that does not exceed $150 received or paid by the individual to park
(i) near public commuter transit services used to commute to his or her place of employment,
(ii) in order to participate in a carpooling group with three or more persons, or
(iii) near his or her place of employment as the driver of a carpooling group of three or more persons,

(c) a yearly amount that does not exceed $240 received or paid by the individual to purchase or maintain a bicycle that is primarily used by the individual to commute to his or her place of employment,
and for the purposes of this definition, shall not include an amount that is deductible under section 118.02 in computing any personâs tax payable under this Part for the taxation year.

Block.MarginalNote:
âpublic commuter transit servicesâ
Â« services de transport en commun Â»

Para.change: âpublic commuter transit servicesâ has the same meaning as in subsection 118.02(1).

Block.Para:
